title: eulophia complanata
intro: Eulophia complanata, also known as the False Orchid, is a terrestrial plant species belonging to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, the Eulophia complanata plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the roots of Eulophia complanata are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and powder, which are used to treat various health conditions.
